title: Jr. Backend Developer
description: Biz Kimiz? Günlük yaşamınızı iyileştirmek için akıllı ve yenilikçi çözümler üretmeye kendini adamış bir markayız. “Şımart Teknoloji” olarak sizlere, hayatınızı daha rahat, daha konforlu ve daha güvenli hale getirmek için tasarlanmış geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunuyoruz. İşini severek yapan ve alanında uzman kişilerden oluşan ekibimiz ile en iyi ürünleri sunmak için sürekli son teknolojiyi araştırıyoruz ve geliştiriyoruz. Hızla büyüyen ve gelişen ekibimize, “Jr. Backend Developer” arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İş Tanımı ·        Backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve mevcut projelerin bakımına destek vermek, ·        API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerine katılmak, ·        Temiz, okunabilir ve sürdürülebilir kod yazmak, ·        Veri tabanı tasarımı ve optimizasyon süreçlerinde görev almak, ·        Yeni teknolojileri takip ederek uygulamalara katkıda bulunmak, ·        Yapay zekayı aktif olarak kullanarak sistemlere dahil etmek. Genel Nitelikler ·        Benzer pozisyonda 1 yıl deneyim sahibi oldum, ·        İyi derecede PHP ve MYSQL bilgim var, ·        Kurumsal şirket ortamını görme ya da çalışma imkanına sahip oldum, ·        Javascript, jQuery, HTML, CSS bilgine sahibim, ·        Etimesgut/Sincan bölgesinde ikamet ediyorum ya da ulaşım konusunda sıkıntı yaşamam diyorsan, başvurunu heyecanla bekliyoruz. Sunduğumuz İmkanlar ·        Genç ve dinamik bir ekip ile çalışma fırsatı, ·        Öğrenme ve gelişim odaklı bir çalışma ortamı, ·        Doğum günü izni, ·        Kaizen sistemi, ·        Aylık performans değerlendirme sistemi ve prim ödülleri. *Çalışma düzenimiz ofistendir.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (.NET & Azure)
description: About Us Nartio is a London-based, fast-growing assessment company dedicated to helping organisations identify and develop talent scientifically and objectively. We provide innovative, data-driven solutions that support better people decisions. To learn more about us, visit www.nartio.com. Position Overview We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join our Istanbul team and take ownership of product development for Nartio’s scalable SaaS platform. This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, cloud architecture, product development, and AI-powered HR technology. You will play a key role in designing, building, and improving secure, high-performance web applications, APIs, and cloud-based services that support enterprise customers globally. What You’ll Do • Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications and APIs. • Build new product features from concept to production. • Develop secure and high-performance backend services using .NET. • Create modern, responsive user interfaces. • Design and optimise database structures. • Integrate third-party systems and external APIs. • Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure. • Participate in architecture, code reviews, and technical planning. • Improve platform performance, reliability, and security. • Work closely with Product, Design, and Customer Success teams. What We’re Looking For • 5+ years of professional software development experience. • Strong expertise in C# and .NET Core / .NET 8+. • Experience with ASP.NET Core Web API development and RESTful APIs. • Strong experience with React, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3. • Experience with Entity Framework Core, LINQ, and Microsoft SQL Server. • Experience with authentication and authorisation, including JWT, OAuth2, and OpenID Connect. • Experience with background processing, queues, and asynchronous workloads. • Strong understanding of performance, scalability, secure coding, and clean architecture. • Practical experience with Microsoft Azure for SaaS applications. • Experience with Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, and Azure Storage. • Knowledge of cloud monitoring, logging, and reliability practices. • Experience with CI/CD using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions. • Experience with Git-based workflows, automated testing, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Nice to Have • Experience building B2B SaaS platforms. • Experience with multi-tenant application architecture. • Experience with AI and LLM integrations. • Knowledge of Azure OpenAI, vector databases, and semantic search. • Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or Infrastructure as Code. • Experience working in HR technology, recruitment, assessment, talent management, learning and development, or analytics platforms. • Experience working in fast-moving startup environments. Nartio is an equal-opportunity employer. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.

title: Full Stack Software Engineering Intern
description: About Lufios Lufios is building AI for operational case tracking. We connect to the ERP, BI, SQL, Excel, and KPI reports companies already use, detect operational anomalies, investigate possible root causes with AI, and ask the right person what happened through channels like WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, and email. Dashboards show what broke. Lufios goes after why it broke, turns the answer into a tracked follow up, and builds a searchable operational memory over time. The product is live, demand is real, and the roadmap is moving faster than a two founder team can build alone. That is why we are looking for a Full Stack Software Engineering Intern to join us this summer. The Role You will work directly with the CEO and CTO on the live Lufios product. No fake intern projects. No layers. No corporate theater. Just you, the founders, real customers, and product work that actually ships. What You Will Do Build full stack features across frontend and backend Work on customer facing product flows Help improve integrations with WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, email, ERP and BI systems, SQL databases, and Excel based data sources Use AI assisted coding tools like Codex and Claude Code Debug, iterate, and ship fast Turn customer feedback into product improvements What We Are Looking For 2nd, 3rd, or 4th year university student Able to work full time over the summer Comfortable building software with JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, or a similar modern language Strong SQL skills and comfortable working with complex queries, joins, aggregations, and operational data Strong mathematical and statistical reasoning, with the ability to turn messy business data into clear logic and useful insights Basic understanding of frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and web apps Comfortable with AI assisted coding and fast iteration Curious about AI, B2B SaaS, startups, and how real businesses operate Hungry to learn, ship, and take ownership Compensation Paid internship plus direct mentorship from the founders. Stock option opportunities in ground.
